description: Runtime knowledge packs for decomp orchestrator Pi agents. Paths are relative to decomp-orchestrator/knowledge.

decomp_find_overview.purpose: Rank and classify high-ROI targets from report.json and objdiff data.

melee_decomp_overview.purpose: Core Melee decomp workflow and quality bar.

melee_single_function_iteration.purpose: One-symbol context, edit, objdiff, cleanup, and validation loop.

melee_resource_guided_research.purpose: Target fact to local analogs to PR/resource evidence to verifier.

melee_matching_tactics.purpose: MWCC source-shape, regalloc, stack, loop, inline, and data-ordering tactics.

melee_ai_assisted_workflow.purpose: How to use AI-generated candidates without trusting unverified source.

melee_evidence_index.purpose: PR-derived evidence base and resource surfaces.

melee_sweep_overview.purpose: When and how to use reproducible decomp sweep runs.

sweep_decomp_run_layout.purpose: Required decomp-runs file tree, artifacts, and state contract.

sweep_target_packet.purpose: Baseline metadata collection for sweep targets.

sweep_high_throughput.purpose: Parallel queue, shard, reducer, dedupe, and beam expansion workflow.

sweep_candidate_matrix.purpose: Candidate family and matrix schema for source-shape sweeps.

sweep_scoring_pareto.purpose: Metrics, reviewability scoring, Pareto frontier, and near-miss selection.

sweep_post_analysis.purpose: Worked/failed analysis, learned patterns, and next-sweep planning.

sweep_objdiff_permuter.purpose: Objdiff JSON summaries, isolated scoring, and permuter handoff.

sweep_charts_state.purpose: Progress charts and current_state.md update contract.

rank_decomp_candidates.purpose: Rank fuzzy functions and linked blocker units from build/GALE01/report.json.

decomp_context_lookup.purpose: Search local code, report metadata, PR history, and resource CSVs for one target.

scaffold_decomp_run.purpose: Create a reproducible decomp-runs/<slug> sweep bundle.

summarize_objdiff_json.purpose: Summarize objdiff JSON for sweep result rows.

render_progress_charts.purpose: Render sweep progress, Pareto, and mismatch SVG charts.

fetch_recent_pr_dump.purpose: Fetch recent GitHub PR metadata, comments, reviews, and diffs into the orchestrator-owned past-PR dump.

build_pr_postmortems.purpose: Build searchable per-PR JSON knowledge records and shared Pi-agent prompt standards.

sync_repo_and_pr_library.purpose: Fetch/rebase the local repo and refresh the orchestrator-owned PR knowledge library.
